mapper.select: SELECT instance_id, database_id, avg_tps as current_tps, avg_qps as current_qps, active_sessions, avg_response_time_ms FROM query_agg_5m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(cpu_usage_percent) as cpu_usage_percent, AVG(memory_usage_percent) as memory_usage_percent, AVG(disk_io_percent) as disk_io_percent FROM ( SELECT avg_cpu_percent as cpu_usage_percent, avg_memory_mb / 1024.0 * 100 as memory_usage_percent, avg_io_blocks / 1000.0 as disk_io_percent FROM query_agg_1m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ) subquery

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cpu_usage_percent DESC) as rank, query_id, short_query, query_type, cpu_usage_percent as value, '%' as unit, execution_count, mean_exec_time_ms as avg_time_ms FROM query_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cpu_usage_percent DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY memory_usage_mb DESC) as rank, query_id, short_query, query_type, memory_usage_mb as value, 'MB' as unit, execution_count, mean_exec_time_ms as avg_time_ms FROM query_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND memory_usage_mb IS NOT NULL ORDER BY memory_usage_mb DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY io_blocks DESC) as rank, query_id, short_query, query_type, io_blocks as value, 'MB/s' as unit, execution_count, mean_exec_time_ms as avg_time_ms FROM query_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND io_blocks IS NOT NULL ORDER BY io_blocks DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY mean_exec_time_ms DESC) as rank, query_id, short_query, query_type, mean_exec_time_ms / 1000.0 as value, '초' as unit, execution_count, mean_exec_time_ms as avg_time_ms FROM query_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND mean_exec_time_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mean_exec_time_ms DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT query_id, short_query, query_text as full_query, query_type, mean_exec_time_ms as execution_time_ms, ROUND(mean_exec_time_ms / 1000.0, 2) || '초' as execution_time_sec, CASE WHEN mean_exec_time_ms >= 5000 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN mean_exec_time_ms >= 2000 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END as severity, CASE WHEN mean_exec_time_ms >= 5000 THEN '긴급 최적화 필요' WHEN mean_exec_time_ms >= 2000 THEN '인덱스 검토 권장' ELSE '모니터링 유지' END as suggestion, collected_at as occurred_at, execution_count, cpu_usage_percent, memory_usage_mb, io_blocks FROM query_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND is_slow_query = true AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY mean_exec_time_ms DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT query_id, short_query, query_text as full_query, query_type, mean_exec_time_ms as execution_time_ms, ROUND(mean_exec_time_ms / 1000.0, 2) || '초' as execution_time_sec, CASE WHEN mean_exec_time_ms >= 5000 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN mean_exec_time_ms >= 2000 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END as severity, CASE WHEN mean_exec_time_ms >= 5000 THEN '긴급 최적화 필요' WHEN mean_exec_time_ms >= 2000 THEN '인덱스 검토 권장' ELSE '모니터링 유지' END as suggestion, collected_at as occurred_at, execution_count, cpu_usage_percent, memory_usage_mb, io_blocks FROM query_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND is_slow_query = true ORDER BY mean_exec_time_ms DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO query_agg_5m ( instance_id, database_id, collected_at, total_queries, avg_tps, avg_qps, avg_execution_time_ms, active_sessions, avg_response_time_ms, slow_query_count, top_cpu_query_1, top_cpu_query_1_value, top_cpu_query_2, top_cpu_query_2_value, top_cpu_query_3, top_cpu_query_3_value, top_cpu_query_4, top_cpu_query_4_value, top_cpu_query_5, top_cpu_query_5_value, top_memory_query_1, top_memory_query_1_value, top_memory_query_2, top_memory_query_2_value, top_memory_query_3, top_memory_query_3_value, top_memory_query_4, top_memory_query_4_value, top_memory_query_5, top_memory_query_5_value, created_at ) VALUES
( #{agg.instanceId}, #{agg.databaseId}, #{agg.collectedAt}, #{agg.totalQueries}, #{agg.avgTps}, #{agg.avgQps}, #{agg.avgExecutionTimeMs}, #{agg.activeSessions}, #{agg.avgResponseTimeMs}, #{agg.slowQueryCount}, #{agg.topCpuQuery1}, #{agg.topCpuQuery1Value}, #{agg.topCpuQuery2}, #{agg.topCpuQuery2Value}, #{agg.topCpuQuery3}, #{agg.topCpuQuery3Value}, #{agg.topCpuQuery4}, #{agg.topCpuQuery4Value}, #{agg.topCpuQuery5}, #{agg.topCpuQuery5Value}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery1}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery1Value}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery2}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery2Value}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery3}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery3Value}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery4}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery4Value}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery5}, #{agg.topMemoryQuery5Value}, #{agg.createdAt} )
